description_en: A wooden sculpture, an early modern seated image of Amida Nyorai. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

description_en: An early modern building, the main hall of Raiden Shrine with its ridge tablets (munafuda). It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

name_en: Konki Hokyoin Pagoda with Komyo Shingon Inscription
description_en: An early modern stone monument, a Hokyoin pagoda inscribed with the Komyo Shingon mantra. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

name_en: Great Map of the Peoples of the World
description_en: An early modern painting, a pictorial map of the peoples of the world. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

name_en: Ten Kings and Ten Buddhas Stone Stupa Slab
description_en: A medieval stone monument, a slab stupa (itabi) depicting the Ten Kings and Ten Buddhas. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

A medieval sculpture, a wooden standing image of Amida Nyorai. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Priest Shoshin
description_en: A medieval sculpture, a wooden seated statue of the priest Shoshin Shonin. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.
A medieval sculpture, a wooden seated image of Shaka Nyorai. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Itakura Town.
An intangible folk cultural property, the Itakura Ondo folk song. It is town-designated by Itakura Town.

name_en: Dance Hall of Nakamura Tenmangu Shrine
description_en: A building, the dance hall (maidono) of Nakamura Tenmangu Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1971-07-24. It is located at Shimozu 2332-1.

name_en: Middle Shrine of Fuji Sengen Shrine

name_romaji: Fujiwara Suwa Jinja Kabuki Butai narabini Kanranseki

description_en: A building, the kabuki stage and spectator seating of Fujiwara Suwa Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1981-02-26. It is located at Fujiwara 3419.

description_en: A painting, a votive tablet (ema) of Akaya Juni Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is held at the Prefectural Museum of History.

description_en: A craft work, a lion-dance head (shishigashira) of Haba Hie Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is located at Haba 588-1.
